nits: The `kind` field on the SSE frame echoes `row.activity_type` rather than the payload's discriminator — identical in production but conceptually distinct
The legacy-key fallback will silently mask a real future schema rename (e.g. worker switches to `target_address`) — acceptable defensive behavior, acknowledged in test comment
`frame.error` falls back to `err.code` then literal 'unknown' — production schema guarantees both code+message so the chain only matters for malformed payloads
reviewer: opus-4.7 adversarial pass via Agent tool, post-fix
